title: Modern Mizuno's
description: A Mizunos 16x addon, bringing support for versions 1.21+ allowing you to build with the Pale Garden blocks while still using your favorite cottage core resource pack.
body:
![Modern Mizuno's Banner](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/620d2b38-144b-41fb-b285-27778715fc97)

## Modern Mizuno's  
The Mizuno's 16x texture pack has played a big part in why I've stuck around with Minecraft for so long, the cartoony and cozy vibes will forever have a place in my heart.  
Unfortunately, official updates for the latest content added to Minecraft Java Edition seem to have stopped. 
I hope to keep Mizuno's alive in the modern era with this add-on acting as an unofficial update to our beloved 16x texture pack that has spawned its own vibrant community.   
Want to help keep Mizuno's alive and provide your suggestions for this pack? Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/qxRVkGDjdJ), where we're always looking for your feedback!

### Features
Currently, the pack supports most of the blocks from the Pale Garden drop update (1.21.4), and I plan to keep working on this until every new asset is in line with the classic Mizuno's style.

<center>

Check out the [**Slider Showcase Album to see what's added in this pack!**](https://imgsli.com/Mzg4MzE4/2/3)

![Pale Garden Before / After Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9dHuFRY9/images/5753e9d373cda2da0ed1ba3f44516935e6fc745b.png)

</center>

### Installation 
This pack is an add-on that contains none of Mizuno's own textures, you still need to [download the original pack from its official Mediafire link](https://www.mediafire.com/file/42pqrtiwkmali5j/Mizuno's_16_Craft_JE_1.20.4-1.0_230105.zip/file), but keep this pack on top of your list!

![Load Order Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9dHuFRY9/images/86f348e50df1b822cde1338e30faebc73aa5813d.png)

*[Download the builds used in our showcases!](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/modern-mizuno-s-pale-oak-showcase)*  
*Requires [Mizuno's 16x JE](https://mizunomcmemo.blogspot.com/p/mizunos-16-craft-cit.html)*  
*Check out [Overgrown Flowery GUI](https://modrinth.com/collection/ua1AmdlB), its used in the showcase images!*  
*Check out [Astralex Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/astralex), it's used in the Banner image!*  
*Some assets derived from [Abyssal Decor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/abyssal-decor).*   
*Some assets derived from [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy)*  
*[Find more Mizunos Resource Packs and addons](https://modrinth.com/collection/lYx28E34/)*  
*This pack utilizes [Everybody Loves: Bees](https://modrinth.com/project/VoPLAAlB).*
